summary: Executed independent backend + frontend verification for requested luxury event website flows using public URL. Backend API routes (/api/, /api/enquiries POST/GET) passed with persistence checks. Frontend critical flows passed: hero intro, sticky header transition, desktop nav/dropdown, homepage sections, portfolio/blog/details, services pages, and enquiry end-to-end submission.

integration_issues.flow: Mobile menu navigation on homepage during intro animation
integration_issues.issue: Menu interaction can fail if attempted before intro completes (transient; passed after intro delay)

issues: Uses native browser date input picker (data-testid=enquiry-event-date-input); inconsistent UX across devices
Gold heading text (#C6A75E) on beige background (#E8D8C3) has relatively low contrast

action_items: Consider allowing mobile header/menu interaction earlier during homepage intro (or shorten intro lock)
Improve blog hero heading contrast for accessibility
Consider replacing native date input with consistent custom date picker component if UX consistency is required
critical_code_review_comments: SiteHeader intentionally applies pointer-events-none before introComplete; this creates a brief interaction lock on homepage
CORS is configured with allow_credentials=True and wildcard fallback origins, which is not recommended for production security hardening
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed enquiry records via API/frontend submission for persistence verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression pytest suite now exists at /app/backend/tests/test_enquiries_api.py. Mobile menu is stable after intro completion; one early-attempt transient failure was reproduced when trying to interact before intro lock clears.
rca of the issue: RCA (mobile transient): On homepage, SiteHeader sets pointer-events-none until introComplete=true (driven by HomePage timed intro). Repro: open homepage on mobile and immediately try menu interactions. Observed panel remaining translated off-screen in failed attempts. Mitigation: wait for intro completion before menu interaction OR remove pointer-event lock from header while preserving visual opacity animation.
